applicable_scenarios: Multi-channel SPI DAC playback with DMA

artifacts.summary: Representative SPI DAC top-level wiring for SPI, fault, reset, LDAC, and sample push control.
Board-specific block-design entry that sources the common SPI DAC BD fragment.
Reusable SPI DAC BD fragment with SPI Engine hierarchy, cyclic DMA, and control register hookups.
Minimal project wrapper that adds top, constraints, and shared support files.
Representative SPI DAC pinout and IOSTANDARD constraints.
